results.description: Each pub type/trait in api/ must be in its own standalone file with the file stem matching the snake_case name

violations.message: api/ file 'main/src/api/refresh/contracts/refresh/spec.rs' contains `pub trait RefreshSpec` but the file stem 'spec' does not match — expected 'api/refresh_spec.rs'
violations.fix_hint: Rename the file to 'api/refresh_spec.rs' (matching the snake_case of 'RefreshSpec'). Update the parent mod.rs to reference the new filename and update any `use` paths across the crate.

violations.message: api/ file 'main/src/api/refresh/contracts/refresh/strategy.rs' contains `pub trait RefreshStrategy` but the file stem 'strategy' does not match — expected 'api/refresh_strategy.rs'
violations.fix_hint: Rename the file to 'api/refresh_strategy.rs' (matching the snake_case of 'RefreshStrategy'). Update the parent mod.rs to reference the new filename and update any `use` paths across the crate.

violations.message: api/ file 'main/src/api/refresh/strategy/oauth/cached_token.rs' contains no pub type/trait declarations — every file in api/ must contain exactly one public interface item
violations.fix_hint: Add a public type/trait to the file, or move private helpers to a non-api module and delete this file.
